description:
This plugin allows users to sign in through an SSO provider (such as Google, Facebook, or your own provider). This enables one-click signin.
SSO sign-in works in the Jellyfin Web UI and in clients that support Quick Connect.
Review documentation at https://github.com/iderex/jellyfin-plugin-sso
name: SSO Authentication
overview: Authenticate users against an SSO provider.

versions.changelog:
Jellyfin 12.0 (.NET 10) beta 5.0.0-JF12-beta (plugin version 5.0.0.18).
Install via the beta repository URL (a Jellyfin 12.0 server picks this build automatically by targetAbi):
https://raw.githubusercontent.com/iderex/jellyfin-plugin-sso/manifest-beta/manifest.json


## What's Changed
* Test SSOViewsController GetView (#192) by @iderex in https://github.com/iderex/jellyfin-plugin-sso/pull/630
* Test FlowResponses shaping helpers (#192) by @iderex in https://github.com/iderex/jellyfin-plugin-sso/pull/631


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/iderex/jellyfin-plugin-sso/compare/5.0.0-JF12-beta.16...5.0.0-JF12-beta.18

Jellyfin 12.0 (.NET 10) beta 5.0.0-JF12-beta (plugin version 5.0.0.15).
Install via the beta repository URL (a Jellyfin 12.0 server picks this build automatically by targetAbi):
https://raw.githubusercontent.com/iderex/jellyfin-plugin-sso/manifest-beta/manifest.json


## What's Changed
* Forward-merge main into 4.2 by @iderex in https://github.com/iderex/jellyfin-plugin-sso/pull/562
* Widen SourceFilesDeclaring to match record struct and struct declarations by @iderex in https://github.com/iderex/jellyfin-plugin-sso/pull/558
* Add SAML service-provider metadata endpoint by @iderex in https://github.com/iderex/jellyfin-plugin-sso/pull/567
* Forward-merge main into 4.2 (post-4.1.0.0 fixes) by @iderex in https://github.com/iderex/jellyfin-plugin-sso/pull/572
* Add a SAML SP signing-key rollover (part 1 of #491) by @iderex in https://github.com/iderex/jellyfin-plugin-sso/pull/573
* Forward-merge main into 4.2 (codeql.yml advanced setup) by @iderex in https://github.com/iderex/jellyfin-plugin-sso/pull/576
* Add an admin Test-connection action per provider by @iderex in https://github.com/iderex/jellyfin-plugin-sso/pull/577
* Add admin config export/import (#161) by @iderex in https://github.com/iderex/jellyfin-plugin-sso/pull/581
* Forward-merge main into 4.2 (README banner) by @iderex in https://github.com/iderex/jellyfin-plugin-sso/pull/580
* Accept a SAML response signed by an optional secondary IdP certificate (completes #491) by @iderex in https://github.com/iderex/jellyfin-plugin-sso/pull/582
* Forward-merge main into 4.2 (CA1873 log hygiene + Alpha docs) by @iderex in https://github.com/iderex/jellyfin-plugin-sso/pull/588
* Forward-merge main into 4.2 (the 4.1.1.0 line + release channels) by @iderex in https://github.com/iderex/jellyfin-plugin-sso/pull/595
* Multi-target net9.0/net10.0 for the 10.11 and 12.0 lines (#135) by @iderex in https://github.com/iderex/jellyfin-plugin-sso/pull/596
* Forward-merge main into 4.2 (3-part versions + release naming) by @iderex in https://github.com/iderex/jellyfin-plugin-sso/pull/598
* Evaluate SAML assertion roles once per login (#479) by @iderex in https://github.com/iderex/jellyfin-plugin-sso/pull/599
* Scoped Stryker.NET mutation testing for the SAML/OIDC core (#169) by @iderex in https://github.com/iderex/jellyfin-plugin-sso/pull/600
* Weekly SharpFuzz job over the SAML parse surface (#174) by @iderex in https://github.com/iderex/jellyfin-plugin-sso/pull/601
* Forward-merge main into 4.2, set 4.2 to its 4.2.0 feature target by @iderex in https://github.com/iderex/jellyfin-plugin-sso/pull/603
* Collapse SamlChallenge relayState init to a ternary (#456) by @iderex in https://github.com/iderex/jellyfin-plugin-sso/pull/604
* Jellyfin 12.0 (5.0) beta publish leg + two-channel manifest model (#135) by @iderex in https://github.com/iderex/jellyfin-plugin-sso/pull/605
* Attest SLSA build provenance for the release plugin zip (#147) by @iderex in https://github.com/iderex/jellyfin-plugin-sso/pull/609
* Drop the deprecated assertion-embedded SAML/Auth path (#528) by @iderex in https://github.com/iderex/jellyfin-plugin-sso/pull/610
* Document the whole-object-replace contract on provider config (S6964, #196) by @iderex in https://github.com/iderex/jellyfin-plugin-sso/pull/615
* Decompose ConvertSigningKeys to cut OIDC id_token validator complexity (S3776, #196) by @iderex in https://github.com/iderex/jellyfin-plugin-sso/pull/616
* Accept-with-reason analyzer dispositions in .editorconfig (#104 Unit 0) by @iderex in https://github.com/iderex/jellyfin-plugin-sso/pull/617
* Make WebResponse string ops culture-invariant (#104 Unit 1) by @iderex in https://github.com/iderex/jellyfin-plugin-sso/pull/618
* Adopt System.Threading.Lock in three lock sites (#104 Unit 3) by @iderex in https://github.com/iderex/jellyfin-plugin-sso/pull/619
* Add paramName to ArgumentException throws (#104 Unit 2, MA0015) by @iderex in https://github.com/iderex/jellyfin-plugin-sso/pull/620
* Correct the stale target-direction section in ARCHITECTURE.md (#318) by @iderex in https://github.com/iderex/jellyfin-plugin-sso/pull/621
* Test the write-only secret converter redaction contract (#192) by @iderex in https://github.com/iderex/jellyfin-plugin-sso/pull/622
* Test the AuthorizeStateBinding anti-forgery cookie (#192) by @iderex in https://github.com/iderex/jellyfin-plugin-sso/pull/623
* Test the SsoRateLimitGate 429 + fail-open invariant (#192) by @iderex in https://github.com/iderex/jellyfin-plugin-sso/pull/624
* Test the admin-or-self authorization helper (#192) by @iderex in https://github.com/iderex/jellyfin-plugin-sso/pull/625
* Anchor JF12 beta releases to the built 4.2 commit (#627) by @iderex in https://github.com/iderex/jellyfin-plugin-sso/pull/628


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/iderex/jellyfin-plugin-sso/compare/4.1.2-beta.4...5.0.0-JF12-beta.15

Jellyfin 10.11 beta build (4.1.1.2).
Install via the beta repository URL:
https://raw.githubusercontent.com/iderex/jellyfin-plugin-sso/manifest-beta/manifest.json

## What's Changed
* Surface failed loads and unlink deletes on the linking page by @iderex in https://github.com/iderex/jellyfin-plugin-sso/pull/565
* Surface failed GetNames loads on the linking page by @iderex in https://github.com/iderex/jellyfin-plugin-sso/pull/570
* Decompose the ~210-line ResolveOrCreateAsync account-resolution method by @iderex in https://github.com/iderex/jellyfin-plugin-sso/pull/568
* Record the challenge NewPath through MutateConfiguration by @iderex in https://github.com/iderex/jellyfin-plugin-sso/pull/571
* Add advanced CodeQL workflow covering main and 4.2 by @iderex in https://github.com/iderex/jellyfin-plugin-sso/pull/575
* Use the new security-team artwork as the README banner by @iderex in https://github.com/iderex/jellyfin-plugin-sso/pull/579
* Add SharpFuzz harness prototype for the login-path parse surface by @iderex in https://github.com/iderex/jellyfin-plugin-sso/pull/583
* Guard computed logging arguments behind IsEnabled (net10 CA1873 prep) by @iderex in https://github.com/iderex/jellyfin-plugin-sso/pull/586
* Advance to Alpha and document the plugin-catalog install path by @iderex in https://github.com/iderex/jellyfin-plugin-sso/pull/585
* Pin OidcClient to 6.x to restore loading on Jellyfin 10.11 (4.1.1.0) by @iderex in https://github.com/iderex/jellyfin-plugin-sso/pull/591
* Release channels: JF10.11 beta manifest + JF10.12 placeholders (#592) by @iderex in https://github.com/iderex/jellyfin-plugin-sso/pull/593
* Fix beta publish under immutable releases (draft + unique tag) by @iderex in https://github.com/iderex/jellyfin-plugin-sso/pull/594


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/iderex/jellyfin-plugin-sso/compare/v4.1.0.0...beta-4.1.1.2

## What's Changed
* Three-part versions + X.Y.Z-<channel> release names + auto release notes by @iderex in https://github.com/iderex/jellyfin-plugin-sso/pull/597


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/iderex/jellyfin-plugin-sso/compare/beta-4.1.1.2...4.1.1-stable

## What's Changed
* Adopt secure development process and repository hygiene by @iderex in https://github.com/iderex/jellyfin-plugin-sso/pull/3
* Bump softprops/action-gh-release from 50195ba7f6f93d1ac97ba8332a178e008ad176aa to 132dbbba49e22bd4837f09b46d32a8edaf6baa58 by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/iderex/jellyfin-plugin-sso/pull/11
* Bump Kevinjil/jellyfin-plugin-repo-action from 0.4.0 to 0.4.3 by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/iderex/jellyfin-plugin-sso/pull/4
* Bump creyD/prettier_action from 4.3 to 4.6 by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/iderex/jellyfin-plugin-sso/pull/5
* Bump actions/checkout from 2 to 7 by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/iderex/jellyfin-plugin-sso/pull/6
* Bump actions/setup-dotnet from 1 to 5 by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/iderex/jellyfin-plugin-sso/pull/7
* Bump actions/download-artifact from 5.0.0 to 8.0.1 by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/iderex/jellyfin-plugin-sso/pull/8
* Bump actions/upload-artifact from 4.6.2 to 7.0.1 by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/iderex/jellyfin-plugin-sso/pull/9
* Bump fjogeleit/yaml-update-action from 0.10.0 to 0.17.0 by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/iderex/jellyfin-plugin-sso/pull/10
* Bump Duende.IdentityModel.OidcClient from 6.0.1 to 7.1.0 by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/iderex/jellyfin-plugin-sso/pull/12
* Bump Jellyfin.Model from 10.11.0 to 10.11.11 by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/iderex/jellyfin-plugin-sso/pull/14
* Bump System.Security.Cryptography.Xml from 9.0.13 to 10.0.9 by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/iderex/jellyfin-plugin-sso/pull/16
* Bump Newtonsoft.Json from 13.0.3 to 13.0.4 by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/iderex/jellyfin-plugin-sso/pull/15
* Add xUnit test foundation with SAML validation regression tests by @iderex in https://github.com/iderex/jellyfin-plugin-sso/pull/18
* Remove unconfigured Black Duck security scan workflow by @iderex with @Copilot in https://github.com/iderex/jellyfin-plugin-sso/pull/19
* Fix thread-unsafe OpenID state store by @iderex in https://github.com/iderex/jellyfin-plugin-sso/pull/21
* Remove unconfigured APIsec scan workflow by @iderex in https://github.com/iderex/jellyfin-plugin-sso/pull/23
* Harden SAML assertion time validation (fail-closed) by @iderex in https://github.com/iderex/jellyfin-plugin-sso/pull/25
* Bind SSO logins to existing accounts fail-closed by @iderex in https://github.com/iderex/jellyfin-plugin-sso/pull/27
* Constrain server-side avatar fetch to public http(s) targets by @iderex in https://github.com/iderex/jellyfin-plugin-sso/pull/29
* Validate SAML assertion AudienceRestriction by @iderex in https://github.com/iderex/jellyfin-plugin-sso/pull/31
* Enforce one-time use of SAML assertions (replay protection) by @iderex in https://github.com/iderex/jellyfin-plugin-sso/pull/33
* Harden the avatar fetch from Copilot review feedback by @iderex in https://github.com/iderex/jellyfin-plugin-sso/pull/35
* Polish SAML validation and fix relayState log forging by @iderex in https://github.com/iderex/jellyfin-plugin-sso/pull/37
* Add least-privilege permissions to CI workflows by @iderex in https://github.com/iderex/jellyfin-plugin-sso/pull/39
* Pin third-party GitHub Actions to commit SHAs by @iderex in https://github.com/iderex/jellyfin-plugin-sso/pull/41
* Tidy the account-link switch and exception (Copilot review) by @iderex in https://github.com/iderex/jellyfin-plugin-sso/pull/43
* Harden the SAML test factory and OpenID state add (Copilot review) by @iderex in https://github.com/iderex/jellyfin-plugin-sso/pull/45
* Rework the README into a truthful landing page by @iderex in https://github.com/iderex/jellyfin-plugin-sso/pull/47
* Link the wiki from the README by @iderex in https://github.com/iderex/jellyfin-plugin-sso/pull/48
* Refine the README AI note and name the sibling project by @iderex in https://github.com/iderex/jellyfin-plugin-sso/pull/50
* Serialize plugin-configuration read-modify-writes by @iderex in https://github.com/iderex/jellyfin-plugin-sso/pull/52
* Add a vulnerable-dependency CI gate by @iderex in https://github.com/iderex/jellyfin-plugin-sso/pull/54
* Enforce the SAML login role allow-list at the session-minting endpoint by @iderex in https://github.com/iderex/jellyfin-plugin-sso/pull/55
* Bind OpenID authorize state to its provider and make it single-use by @iderex in https://github.com/iderex/jellyfin-plugin-sso/pull/56
* Verify Jellyfin compatibility in CI (ABI consistency + packaging) by @iderex in https://github.com/iderex/jellyfin-plugin-sso/pull/58
* Require modern signature algorithms in SAML validation by @iderex in https://github.com/iderex/jellyfin-plugin-sso/pull/59
* Add Copilot custom instructions for code review by @iderex in https://github.com/iderex/jellyfin-plugin-sso/pull/62
* Resolve SonarCloud findings across web assets and the compat script by @iderex in https://github.com/iderex/jellyfin-plugin-sso/pull/64
* Remove stray comment token breaking the checkbox-wrapper rule by @iderex in https://github.com/iderex/jellyfin-plugin-sso/pull/67
* Use optional chaining in the server-response filter by @iderex in https://github.com/iderex/jellyfin-plugin-sso/pull/65
* Scope SonarCloud analysis to source, excluding img assets by @iderex in https://github.com/iderex/jellyfin-plugin-sso/pull/71
* Build the account-linking DOM without HTML interpolation by @iderex in https://github.com/iderex/jellyfin-plugin-sso/pull/68
* Document the mandatory two-reviewer PR process in CODEOWNERS by @iderex in https://github.com/iderex/jellyfin-plugin-sso/pull/72
